name: Sujana Jeevana
ragam: Khamas | Tāḷa: Rūpaka (3x4) | Ārō: SMG³MPD²N²Ṡ | Avarō: ṠN²D²PM¹G³R²S
rawText:
Rāga: Khamas | Tāḷa: Rūpaka (3x4) | Ārō: SMG³MPD²N²Ṡ | Avarō: ṠN²D²PM¹G³R²S

LR:   su ja na jī  va     na           rā ma    suguṇa bhū  sha      na    rā ma

LR:   su ja na jī  va     na           rā ma    suguṇa bhū  sha      na    rā  ma

LR:   su ja na jī  va     na        rā ma       sugu na bhū  sha     na    rā  ma

Anupallavi:
Line: * M  N,D DNṠ,ṠN   | Ṡ, ,, ,, Ṡ, Ṡ,      | ,,   ND, N Ṡ, ,, Ṡ, | ṠṘN, N, ,, NDD, ||
LR:     bhu ja ga bhū sha   ṇā    rccita           budha janā va      na

Line: * M  N,D DNṠ, ṠN  | {ṘṘṠṠ},, ,, Ṡ, Ṡ,   | ,,   Ṡ Ṁ, Ġ Ṡ, ,, ṠN | DN{Ṡ,ṘṠ}N,,,NDD,} ||
LR:     bhu ja ga bhū  sha  ṇā    rccita           budha ja nā  va      nā

Line: Ṡ, Ṙ, Ṡ, ,, N,D,  | N, Ṡ, ṠDṠN N, ND    | P,D,DP PDN,D,      | M P, ,, ,, D,N DP, ||
LR:   tmaja van di ta     śri ta can  da na     daśa tu ran  ga      mā    ma vā

Line: Ṡ, Ṙ, Ṡ, ,, N,D,  | {DNṘṠ ṠDṠN} N, ND   | {P,D,DP PDN,ṘŚ}ND  | M P, ,, ,, {Ṡ,N³ DP,} ||
LR:   tmaja van di ta     śri ta can  da na     daśa tu ran  ga      mā    ma va

Charanam:
Line: ,, *MG,M P , ,, D, | {ṠNṘṠ ṠN NDDP M,}   | ,,   PND, PMM, MGRG | G M, ,, ,, ,, ,, ||
LR:      cā  ru nē tra    śrī  ka  ḷa    tra      śrī ra mya  gā      tra

Line: ,, *PG,MP, DNṘṠ   | {ṠN ND DP PNDP M,}  | ,,   PN,D PMM, ,, R,G | MP,M G M, ,, ,, ,, ||
LR:      tā  ra ka nā    ma su ca ri    tra      daśara tha   pu       tra
